Item 1. Business

Microsoft Corporation is a cloud-first platform and productivity company. We operate through three segments: Productivity and Business Processes, Intelligent Cloud, and More Personal Computing. Our mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more.

Founded in 1975 and headquartered in Redmond, Washington, Microsoft employs approximately 228,000 people worldwide as of June 30, 2024.

Our strategic priorities include extending AI capabilities across the Microsoft Cloud, expanding our gaming footprint through Activision Blizzard, and accelerating Azure adoption across enterprise customers.
